summary: This is an extremely brief post consisting of just a single line announcing the formation of a Joel on Software reader group in Toronto, and asking if other cities want to form groups too. There is no substantive argument or analysis. It serves purely as a community-building announcement for Joel's readership. The post reflects the era of blogs as community hubs where readers would organize local meetups.
key_points: A Joel on Software reader group was forming in Toronto
Joel was encouraging readers in other cities to form similar local groups
The post reflects the community aspect of early 2000s blogging culture
key_insight: This is a trivial community announcement with no substantive content to analyze.
